name: Sugar Snap Peas with Lemon Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan of boiling salted water, blanch the snap peas for 1 minute.
2. Drain them in a colander.
3. Immediately plunge the drained peas into a bowl of ice and cold water to stop the cooking process.
4. Allow the peas to cool completely in the ice bath.
5. The peas may be prepared up to this point, 1 day in advance and kept covered and chilled.
6. In a large heavy skillet, melt the butter with the lemon zest over moderately low heat.
7. Add the cooled peas to the skillet, season with salt and pepper to taste, and gently stir until the peas are hot throughout.
Serves 6.
Gourmet
June 1992
